text:
いいかもいいかも！
わたしもあなたも
なんだかとーっても良くなってる！

やっぱり一緒に来て良かったねー！
って、まとめに入るのは
ちょっとまだ早過ぎかな？

終わって帰還するまでが訓練だもんね。
気を抜かず、がん

That's it! That's what I'm talking about!
I think the both of us are getting really good
at this!

I'm sure glad I came out here with you!
Although I guess I should probably save the
celebrations till we get back, huh?

Our training's not over till it's over!
Let's keep our heads in the game until we're
home safe.
